messages.text: Hey I'm back in karachi let me know when I can send your parcel
whichever is eas y for u
Can you confirm your flat number

Beshak har cheez mein Allah ki behtari hogi IA. I cried my heart so don't have any words or energy but just this reel that portrays the same: https://www.facebook.com/share/r/1CJCYPC7rf/ I wish you all the best for your life ahead, getting on your feet and doing masters, ace your life and end up with someone much better IA
She told durriya doesn't want to now and wants to do masters and be on her feet, I guess that might be the reason
My fam felt a bit embarrassed and was taken aback after a lavish welcome and a sweet meeting and were looking forward to meeting, planned all the menus etc but maybe it wasn't destined to be
They kept asking me if something happened but I wish I could tell them anything, so I just said maybe it wasn't meant to be
Maybe we don't always get what we pray for in Tahajjud. May Allah makes it easy for everyone
jo naseeb mein hoga wohi milega no one can stop that
Duaen to khair naseeb bhi badal detee hain
I wish you had told me before we'd even come to your house. Literally everyone in my fam was excited of the possibility of you and your family coming over to our house
its not my fault we broke up.
take care and if u ever need me or anything im j a text away
I probably never cried more than I did today
But InnshaAllah for what's it worth
May you get your heart's happiness
never my intention to hurt you ever or anyone involved
But I might never be able to forgive you for inviting my family only to say no
its my family's opinion on whats right for me. please show some respect
they invited u guys over and did the whole thing on just my request.
and my family was even more involved than urs.
the while purpose was so my family could meet and consider and think.
She clearly said durriya wants to be on her feet and masters so we aren't considering anything serious
I heard it, my nani heard it, my mama heard it
And the look on their face
that is what they want for me bruh
and ofcourse i agree with their wishes
And they kept asking me if she started liking someone or what
Or didn't you guys were in this together
Your fam said no without even telling why

I was also considering continuing my gsk role because i thought your mom would like me to be working in a stable role but I guess now I will probably resign tomorrow. I don't think I'll keep myself together if I see you
But in all honesty, I'll always guard your secrets. Everything we talked about, everything you shared, everything we did or went through. I'll keep that safely always
And I have nothing but best wishes for you🫶🏻
best of luck! u deserve much better
I never wanted better but you :/ I pray that you can get someone who can love you more than me
How would you like to take this forward?
i am deeply and genuinely sorry for the hurt ive caused you
The hurt that's caused probably wasn't your attention but it left in an unfillable hole that is so deep that I don't know how I'll ever recover from this
How difficult it is getting over with someone you love with all your heart?
Have you been able to? Anything that helped doing so?
Do you miss old moments? How do you escape the thoughts?
it is painful for me too
How were you able to remove feelings or was it over time
please lets j focus on becoming friends
I'm seeking counseling from you as a friend
So I can try doing the same
I thought the only way to stop feeling for someone or loving someone was to hate them or remove them from life, but there got to be a better way
I don't want to be unfair so just trying to figure things out
i dont have any as its my first time too
No worries, enjoy cookies too. Their lava chocolate is the new flavor

I created a custom gpt in chatgpt that allows you to describe what you want to create and gives a json prompt (much better than textual prompt). You can use it in nano banana or chatgpt image generator (it got really better) for any image generation, slides, animations, graphics etc. Paste your reference, tell what you want and the things you don't want etc with aspect size of the image and let it do the rest. Thought to share as it might help you with presentations and creating exactly what you'd want

Also this website has been getting a lot of popularity for creating decks and presentations. I thought this can help you a lot in your role https://gamma.app/create You can try from my account which I created to try as well m.maazsiddiqui28@gmail.com Abc@1234 <This message was edited>
You can create new or modify existing ppts with it
Must be tiring but weekend is here
Bhabhi told me she had a convo with you
I also wrote something for you from last night till morning but I'd think it'll overwhelm atp
it was a good convo shes so sweet MA
Is there anything that came out of that convo?
did she tell u what we talked about

She just told me she had a convo with you and is asking is there a possibility for you both to get on the same page. She was like that's the only one thing that can help you, and her family felt like it's too quick and that our family should clarify that we can wait and I can wait
Can we have a call too if that's okay with you?
You and your family really are so very nice MA
I am willing to do whatever it takes, I promise
That's what I wrote all night
But kabhi tou karni hi hogi
I'll clarify any issues, we can wait too
wo tab dekha jayega jab naseeb mein hoga
Naseeb Allah sabke ache karay InnshaAllah
But durriya we do have to decide sometime
This time may never come again
What if my nani calls your mom and reassures
please dont ask ur nani to do that
We don't want to put any pressure too
ur mom has asked my mom to think and hiba has asked me to think and we have shared our concerns which are not related to u ur or family
that is a commitment in itself
You can stand on your feet
I'll even support you all along
i cant and wont ask that of you
Is there any other reason of saying no?
i explained everything to hiba too
But I'd like if you tell me too
And just say if it's a no then say no
its exactly as my mom said promise
Is there a reason she decided so quickly?
I'm willing to fight for you durriya
She wants to know from her, wants to reassures her. We all really like you
She knows how much I was disheartened yesterday. I was at a wedding and was crying literally
I am sorry to hear that
Can we try one last time
I know she'd be very concerned too
But we wanna show her that you'll be her daughter and I'll be her son
I will do everything for you durriya
My family will support me completely
My mom also ofc is concerned and feels sad and bad too but all families try to take the decision thqt seems good
I cant and dont want you and your family committed to mine :/ Ik apki family mein jaldi shadi hoti hai and achi baat hai MA
jo naseeb mein hoga wou hona hoga IA IA
i pray bohat acha naseeb hou
Can you do one final istikhara
And no pressure from my family
It's ofcourse a khuwaish to grow together but absolutely not a reason to say
We can work it out, if we can get on the same page
Your mom might want to see if you're interested too
no please we both should focus on feeling better
Then I'll let my nani call your mom
And let them figure it out
She said durriya wants to study and stand on her feet
My nani will try to reassure all her fears
Is there any issue in it?
I wasnt there I wasnt even home
I also came at the very end
So that's what I heard her saying
But she didn't say no directly
Probably thinking we took too fast
And we just wanna tell her we can wait for her
She also said she didn't tell mamus too and will want to do it first
Jab shadi ki jaldi nahi hai toh phir commitment kyu
It's just about we won't be looking for anyone anymore, if there's a no, my fam will say to move on
Unless you're willing to let go of me and my family
If your family says no, my family will want to move on
yes fhat is what not waiting means
jo naseeb mein hoga wohi milega humein IA
But if you want time to stand up on your feet and do masters
We can wait is what we meant
Ofcourse IA but it's like keep praying with no effort
Naseeb badal bhi jatay hain duaon se
achi cheezein k liye dua kiya karein🤍
Do you not want it yourself at all?
You seem very hesitant even to the idea
You can be honest and say no, no I don't want you Maaz or be a part of your family. I just want to align
If it's your family, I'll still want to try
If it's you, then I'd let you go
What my family feels is what I feel too
From what i understand it's not a no from your family
And seems like you don't really have any saying in it
So I don't want to quit too early
Because I promised you that I'll fight for you and I'll convince my fam to do so
I dont get anything from istikharas
thank you maaz but you dont have to ❤️
Me and my fam got positive
I don't have to but I can't let it go too
But Allah rewards those who make an effort
I can't let go of the most precious thing in my life so easily
you will get many beautiful things in your life inshaAllah
you are a part of my prayers
InnshaAllah but I know it won't be more beautiful than this so
I'll want to do whatever it takes
it will be you j cant imagine it rn
It was with me and InnshaAllah it'll be with me too
May Allah helps me imagine it
im a bit exhausted and all
if u ever need me ofc alwyas a text away
Wou toh saari apki marzi hai
And I'll not want to overwhelm you more
I'll send you tomorrow and let you go and rest?
Thanks so much for talking to me
I'd have sent it at night or day but i didn't want to divert your attention during office time
I'd probably would want to wait a lot more time
Give you a lot more space
But I am just afraid that I'll not miss the time
And do everything I can possibly
I'll send it now, you can read it whenever you'd feel like it. Some might seem repetition of above convo so you can excuse me for that

Hey, I hope you are going to have a wonderful weekend! (Disclaimer that in no way I want to overwhelm you or push you away. I just wanted to do this one last try before your or my family would completely get off road. You can take all your time and be better and figure things out, I'll handle everything else and will give you all the space and time you'd need. I wanted to wait a month or so before sending to give you more space but I just cant, can't afford to lose you😭) I'd want to take this as one last opportunity, knowing there can probably be absolutely no chance from your end (but I hope there's 🥺) but I'd like to take it anyway because I don't want to give up on you while there's even a vvvv minute chance. I am always open for you working and I'll be your mom's son and will personally be supporting her too. Your ambitions are my ambitions, your dreams are my dreams, your goals are my goals. I'll not just be a partner, I'll be your other half, I'll always uplift you, I'll always help you and yk I just love to make things for you, whether helping through recruitment or what, I love being there for you. I'll always be supporting you in your goals and you'll be along your mom be my responsibility and I have already talked to my family about this and they are so happy to hear me being mature and doing the right thing. I'll love your family like it's mine, ofcourse I will be right with you and your shield in every thick and thin. I am taking a very firm stand and I know you're worth fighting for and I'll do whatever is in my power to make it work IA. Iske baad jo hua wo naseeb ki marzi but I believe in Allah, in my pure intentions and knowing that he knows the best and how much I'm praying for you. I'd like to know if you'd want to be on my side as I'm so used to of being with you, you always completed me and made me whole and I feel super lonely right now, but I won't stop fighting and winning my other half back no matter whatever it takes Your mom mentioned that she liked us and that you wanna study and do job. If you feel like you're not ready now but will be later, I'll be happy to wait for you if we can't do masters together. I just wanted you to know that I'll wait for you and be only yours. But if your heart is completely off me and won't want to consider me ever then please let me know too. If you wanna take your time before answering, or just a straight no, I'd appreciate your honest take. Part of me still has some hopes of all the prayers I did, but I don't have the power to change or control hearts and no one but Allah. But there's a strange hope in me that Allah might do a miracle, can't just stop praying. Your answer will help me a lot in solving the unstoppable scenarios that I keep seeing with eyes closed or sleeping. Break ups happen and there's still a possibility of getting back (just like the movie we watched to all the boys I've loved before). It's the hardest for you and ik you push people away to avoid getting hurt and I've hurt you a lot but trust me I'll do it all to regain your trust back if you allow me. You know my intentions, my heart, my trust for you and care for you was always real and pure. Nazar really got us, ah I wish nazar na lagti, what used to be a happy couple, got destroyed in chaos, but part of me still believes that our love was so pure and strong that we can bounce back even in the darkest of times. I always told you I won't give up on you, I don't know how to let go of the most precious thing of my life, my absolute will to live and love and be better every single day, to provide love and to earn so I can fulfill all your wishes. Life won't be the same without you and in our hearts we'll always have that feeling. I promise to be better than every guy you'd find in this world, Allah knows my heart is so full of you and I'll genuinely give you everything I got. I'll be the best version of myself for you and your family and for everyone I'm a human and I have made mistakes and I dearly repent them and I promise I'll do everything to make it better. I'll do everything to take care of you and to give you so much love that you'd forget every single thing. I found true love in your form, I don't want to let it go, let you go that easily. I'll handle everything, my family, your family, you, career, I'll do whatever it takes to turn your life into a heaven. I promised that I'll do it before and make you feel the most loved person, I did some mistakes that I'll not repeat this time and show you all the care and all forms of love that you deserve. I'll be a man, like you always wanted. This heartbreak made me a completely different person, one who is willing to do everything to win your heart back if there's a remote chance to do so. My heart is so full of you and even if yours is empty, I'm ready to do whatever it takes to fill it again, anything I'll do for you. I just want to know if you'd want that too. Naseeb is real and may Allah sabke naseeb achay karay but prayers can turn and shape destinies too. Har cheez beshak Allah k hath mein hai but Allah wants us to make conscious effort and I didn't want to leave it just to prayers but to reach out to you again knowing your answer might not be positive but I just didn't want this chance to let you go. Allah tests us with hurdles and I just want to remain steadfast InnshaAllah. Even if it's like finding a needle in haystack, I'll take it. Even if there's minutest of the feeling in your heart for me that feels the same and wants the same, I'd like to know. Just a few weeks without you and it felt like a lifetime of darkness: https://www.facebook.com/share/r/14SnxDD8gKk/ I couldn't sleep all night, cried my heart out but everytime I'd close my eyes I'd see you. Saw you in a happy dream with me too that gave me the courage to write it all down and poured all my heart infront of you. Please take your time and think from your heart and mind, think of both good and bad times (I promise to take them away), think of the times when you were happy and times when you were sad (I promise to make them happy). Think of how being with me felt (I promise I'll make it better and better and it gets better when we aren't talking on texts but living together, I won't argue with you or hurt you ever intentionally. These are very honest words, words I have reflected over and over again. I wish I could do more than this, I wish I had a clock to reverse time, but I can only promise by God, that I've changed a lot and I'll keep working on every flaw of mine to become the best for you. Make you feel the princess you are deserving of you). This is the time we manifested dearly, families meeting and discussing. This time might never come back again (life is cruel as it rarely gives us second chance 🥺 and I want to choose you over everything else so that life may never contain this regret of finding the love of my life and letting her drift away🥺 I don't want you to go, you're my rock, my safe place and on any given day I'd wanna choose you over everyone else. If this moment goes away, the dream would vanish as both families would move on, but if, if there's a slightest of chance you'd wanna take more time and re-decide, I'll handle everything else. I'll fight for what's it worth, take a stand until you're ready. This very moment can change the course of our lives, I just want you to know that there's still a chance if you've any possibility of reconsideration. One chance to change the life and I promise to make it so beautiful that you'll end up forgetting all your worries. Please please give it one final thought (for the sake of all good times and moments and happiness and joys that we shared, for the sake of me and you and all the memories we created and all the plans we made for future and for the sake of our love that we held for each other). I'll wait to hear from you, an honest answer. I'm here to answer anything, clarify anything, reassure anything or do anything to prove my words
i am making a lot of blunders and struggling to understand
Not yet, I couldn't figure things in my head :(
I understand that could be frustrating
Is there anything in particular that you are struggling?
But I'm also struggling too, plus I got to know things that omer and ali were talking when I wasn't there which were disheartening
just a lot of mistake sometimes which are careless sometimes which are just me being idk dumb😭🙏
No no, it seems like it but it's just that you're just a trainee. Mistakes happen
InnshaAllah you'll bounce back better than expected
If I'll be of help in anything, I'll be happy to
Just about how indecisive I'm and just to make sure they use me to the fullest before giving any incentives etc
wow what the hell itna manipulative
They literally used these words, a friend from a different department told me
Tell him he's doing great so he keeps working
Ik it's messed up but kia karen
Do you get scolded on them?
my probation is abt to end and JJ and shahzeb and Moiz have been asked to give my feedback
No one deserves to get scolded :(
if i deserve to be a permanent employee
We all make mistakes in the starting
lets see now idk ive already complained against moiz cos he spoke to me harshly pehle
no not these ppl some others
Why other people are allowed to scold you
It works like that in this department
Uh oh, it must be really disheartening
It's okay to make mistakes, don't worry you'll see in the feedback, they'd give InnshaAllah a very good one because knowing you, you always strive for 100%
But what do you think as well that matters more
idk i feel like their perception of me may have fallen in the past month
ive been getting stressed more easily and slower in my work prolly
But trust me you can regain that as well InnshaAllah
There are things beyond our control. You always give your best and InnshaAllah you'll see the best outcome
There might still be time to bounce back, anything that I can help you with or support if needed

Ik it must be super overwhelming right now and I can't wonder what you'd be going through. You can lean on me for anything and talk if you'd like and know that I'm always rooting for you and praying for you. You'll ace this one as well IA
No it is alright ive got it
ik you'd make the right decision
Is there anything on your mind about the job
Psl work must be starting to kick in too
yes today was the first event
They're gonna make it bigger this time
abhi bhi uska kaam chal rha
Ah hbl never leaves you with peace
I remember that time about the caption
Wo jo merch earn karne ka
I think one more time it was an internal form too
Jiska apko approval nahi milraha tha
all the work i do it never goes live
Do you enjoy the work you do regardless of it?
jo enjoy karti hu wohi toh nahi hotaa
Can I come to pick you office tomorrow if you'd allow me
If not I'm available whenever you'd like
You can let me know whenever works for you
tomo night once im free and have gone into weekend mode
Text me if you need me for anything
Hey it's gonna be extremely cold tonight will drop lower than 10, I'm sure you'd already know but pls cover yourself properly when sleeping. Have a wonderful day tomorrow
And would be windy outside too, do take care. I'm here if you need me for anything

*AFFECTED AREAS / ROUTES* Karachi- *Friday, 9th Jan. 2026* Arrival at Jinnah International Airport KHI. - 1100hrs - 1200hrs to 1500hrs @ Insaf House “party meeting” - 1630hrs Meet The Press @ KHI Press Club - 1745hrs- District South - 1930hrs- District Korangi - 2130hrs- “Meeting with party workers - 2230hrs District Malir *Karachi to Hyderabad Transit* Saturday, 10 January 2026 From 09:30 hrs onward VIA M-9 Super Highway *KARACHI - Sunday, 11 January 2026* - 1100hrs - District Central Party Meeting - 1230hrs - District Kimari movement” - 1430hrs - District West “street mobilisation movement” - 1630hrs - “Visit to Mazar-e-Quaid. Impact- Intermittent traffic delays, short-notice diversions, restricted access near venues, Slowed traffic and possible temporary stoppages during convoy movement. Local congestion, increased police presence.
Ali Boolani sent on our gsk group
i dont think i pass by these routes
If press club is blocked then the area towards exiting shahrahe faisal is blocked If Korangi is blocked then it'll impact both dha routes and shahrahe faisal
They might not fall directly in route
But they can affect your route
But this might not be true either as I only saw it sent by Ali B (who usually only shares credible stuff but idk either)
If this is true, either take malir expressway or lyari expressway
I hope office was better today
I am fine alhamdulillah as well
Just wished nikkah anniversary to bhai bhabhi
Ik it's late and you must be tired, would you want to call tonight
Let me know whenever you'd want to
I'll never hurt you again I promise
And I'm sorry for pushing it so far
That my love for you was always the purest ❤️
I've had so many stories left untold, things about life, my plans, my trip etc
I'll miss sharing everything with you
I didn't even watch stranger things yet, hoping we might work things out and I'll watch with you
Our hearts beating with each other
Everything I wanted to express just pushed you away, this video does it best https://www.facebook.com/share/r/17emcBRsun/
We can't be friends but we won't be enemies We have become strangers with tons of memories Carrying baggage full of emotions With hearts holding untold stories
The way you pushed me away today
Hurt a lot but helped a lot too, had you shown any softness, I might would have mistaken it
Thank you for being so strong (you always have been)
Yk the dream I told you about, the bad one?

It was like you passed away and I have so much grief and things I had to say but how. I woke up so sad and I prayed sm sm sm to Allah tala that may he allows me to fix things, so I won't ever have this grief to see you vanish from my life
Ik you don't need to see this and you can skip my messages
But I don't have anyone but you to talk to
Goodluck and prayers and best wishes

Goodbye Durr! From ~ a heart full of love for you that would never have given up on you unless you definitely said no multiple times (I still don't know how to give up) ~ a guy madly in love with you, who if given just one final chance will do whatever it takes to win you back and keep your for life ~ a teenager falling in love for the first time with all his heart ~ a partner who shared ambitions to make partner's life a wonderful one ~ mind that's always thinking about you and making your life easy, seeing you succeed and help in anything ~ hands that prayed for you when everyone else was asleep ~ delusional mind that kept making all the false scenarios and kept retrying Goodbye Durriya, you'll forever be a part of my memories. I hope our paths never cross again but if they ever do, may it doesn't end like this. May Allah always guides you in making the best decisions :)

You went from being so caring and loving to suppressing all the feelings and not showing anything. I hope this gives you an opportunity to be more independent and do things you always doing. You turned into an avoidant attachment person who'd want to avoid any attachments to avoid getting themselves hurt. I hope it helps you get back on your feet but as we don't always get we wish for, I'll be the one you'd have let go of and I hope you don't miss me enough to regret letting me go. While you made your decision and InnshaAllah sab Allah behtari karega, think to yourself sometime, would you rather be with someone who would give everything to win you back and is on a mission, taking stands in family, keeps trying despite hearing no because he genuinely sees in you a person he'd always cherish or starting over with a complete stranger (I think it isn't urgent rn but at some time you might have to, InnshaAllah Allah naseeb achay karega yaqeenan koi shehzada hi milega apko), would you rather walk on the life path alone or have someone to share this journey together no matter how long or how tough. A partner that saw you as his other half, your mother as his own, your dreams as his dreams. It's rare durriya, you'll crave for this love and care. You're letting it go while you still could hold on to it. Taqdeer Allah karta but tadbeer hamaray hath mein, decisions are meant to hold for sure, but some people are worth fighting for. See if I'm worth it for you to fight your inner self. I'll leave you with food for thoughts knowing your answer might never change but atleast I won't have this regret of trying everything I could to make it work or make up for the mistakes I did for (I really repented and worked on myself for it), regret of not getting to show it to you :( but Allah khair karega
Things didn't work out before but InnshaAllah they'll work later for both of us at our times🫶🏻

Just that I won't have Durr to celebrate with me the smallest of the moments nor you'd have Maaz with u to enjoy them to the fullest It sucks right? Ik it does. But Allah tests people with someone they love the most. You know even after you saying no, I'd still leave that to Allah because sometimes we make decisions emotionally and in a haste but Allah is the almighty who guides the best. I believe in Him, InnshaAllah what's written for us will happen but sincere prayers can change destinies too. May Allah accepts mine and yours both
I'd like us to have a face to face closure, let's do it at main campus where we started. We can end it there
It'll help me emotionally accept it
I'll accept and respect your decision as final so won't talk about it again
I'll always be your well wisher and will pray for you. Seeing you happy will make me happy InnshaAllah
Let me know if we can meet next week one last time and have a proper closure. If not I'll understand too, no compulsions
I told nani that we won't be moving ahead, but for her peace she called your mom and talked to her herself
I thought a lot about staying friends
I'll let you know about it when we'd meet for our closure. I changed my mind
we can meet on a work day?
That might be difficult for you, you get free late and will be exhausted already
Monday I'll be resigning so I'll not be emotionally strong
We can do wed or thurs
I was hoping to meet at campus
We can do next se next week
her dance practices dholkis then main events sab kuch
Weekday, you'd be occupied in work
Plus where would we even sit
Looks like you're gonna have a busy month
Won't it get late for you
I might not be comfortable in tipu, where others would be sitting by the side
Reminds of when you went to drop
You don't have to change your plans or anything
If there's an opportunity that comes up in bw
like i cant even if i wanted to
iss weekend k b pehlw se
We can meet warna we'll work out a bit
Mishas event for the whole month?
dance pracs hv been gojng kn since a whike now
im on thin ice w my familt too and everything
u know everything so pls understand
I didn't get what you said
But Misha lives so far, how do you commute
karna parta hai kuch na kuch 😭😭
I'm fine with a weekday too
I understand you'd be busy on weekends, I wanted to know of any possibility of it because I really wanted our final memory to be a calm and relaxing one
I'd like to take you from office to home
Because that'll probably be my last at office too
okay chalo i will let u know
But I'll just communicate it abhi hi that I might not be comfortable in the open
So if it matters, we'd have to find a place that allows more comfort
This is about both of us
So maybe sit in car and have coffee there
Just want it to be comfortable to you as well
You can suggest alternate as well
Or something you'd feel comfortable with
If you need me for anything
Even if it's something big or small
Have a nice time ahead InnshaAllah
Oh God, I miss talking to you everyday :/
Your notif would always give butterflies
What do you do when you miss that could help not getting immersed? <This message was edited>
When will you be back home today
I had to talk about something
But it can wait till Thursday too
Let me know whatever works for you
I want to talk about staying friends
Text me if you ever need me
I just couldn't stop but wanted to tell you as soon as I can
That this will always be your safe space
But I'd like you to know too
Ik if it was meant to be, it would have happened
And I know part of you might still have wanted things to take place, just the timing wasn't right
And things shaped in a way that neither you nor I could control
So I will always cherish you
We can't go back to being in a relationship
But you have always been my best friend
I just want to know if we can continue that way with no commitment and no harsh feelings
Just let me know if you can
But I'd want to be your top priority
But if this is too much asking then let me know
I can't go and become just a random friend who'll get lost in memories
I just want to be the same person just not in a relationship still being close enough to openly share and discuss things
I mean ofcourse i'd love to confide in you but dosti mein compulsion prioritues weghera thori na hotin
and please just think and let me know what would help you feel better
would this help you get over me?

Dear Omer and Kashif, I hope you are both well. As discussed informally earlier this month, I am writing to formally resign from my position as Management Trainee. This week will be my last full working week. While I am not required to serve a notice period as a trainee, I will continue to support through this week to help with the Plan Rollover and ongoing CCC activities. Beyond this week, I will not be able to provide further support on Egypt market activities. At Omer’s request, I am happy to provide limited, partial availability for the remainder of January focused on the ViiV masterfile development and a few hours of handover support. However, due to important family commitments that cannot be compromised, I will not be able to take on any additional responsibilities beyond this. I will ensure all company assets, including the laptop, are handed back by the end of January. I would like to sincerely thank you both for the opportunity, guidance, and support over the past months. It has been a genuinely valuable experience, and I am grateful for everything I have learned while working with the teams. Warm regards, Maaz
